levels.name: Fundamentos
levels.description: Conceptos basicos de IA y Claude. Ideal para quienes inician su recorrido con modelos de lenguaje.

levels.name: Prompt Engineering
levels.description: Tecnicas de prompting efectivo: few-shot, chain-of-thought, structured output y mejores practicas.

levels.name: Builder Basics
levels.description: Introduccion a la API de Claude, SDKs y primeros proyectos funcionales.

levels.name: Advanced Builder
levels.description: Patrones avanzados: tool use, streaming, batch processing y arquitectura de agentes.

levels.name: Infrastructure
levels.description: Model Context Protocol, Claude Code, CLAUDE.md, hooks, subagentes y configuracion avanzada.

levels.name: Cloud Integration
levels.description: Integracion empresarial: Amazon Bedrock, Google Vertex AI, pipelines CI/CD y despliegue en produccion.

levels.name: Enterprise
levels.description: Gobernanza, seguridad, escalabilidad, observabilidad y operaciones a escala empresarial.

domains.name: Agentic Architecture
domains.description: Loops agenticos, orchestration patterns, task decomposition, Agent SDK lifecycle, session resumption, token economics y context leakage prevention.

domains.name: Tool Design & MCP
domains.description: Primitivas MCP (tools, resources, prompts), distribucion de herramientas, umbral de degradacion de 18 tools, tool_choice modes y MCP server configuration.

domains.name: Claude Code & Configuration
domains.description: CLAUDE.md hierarchy, @import y .claude/rules/ con YAML frontmatter globs, custom commands, Skill frontmatter y CI/CD pipeline integration.

domains.name: Prompt Engineering
domains.description: Explicit criteria, few-shot prompting, structured output con tool_use, JSON schema design, validation-retry loops y batch processing.

domains.name: Context & Reliability
domains.description: Progressive summarization trap, persistent case facts, lost-in-the-middle effect, escalation triggers, error propagation y scratchpad delegation.

scenarioPool.title: Multi-Agent Customer Support System
scenarioPool.description: A large fintech company is deploying a multi-agent system for customer support. A coordinator agent triages incoming requests and delegates to specialized subagents for billing, account management, and compliance. The system processes 50,000+ tickets/month.

scenarioPool.title: CI/CD Pipeline Code Review Agent
scenarioPool.description: An engineering team integrates Claude Code into their CI/CD pipeline to perform automated code reviews on pull requests. The agent must follow project-specific coding standards defined in CLAUDE.md, use custom slash commands for different review types, and produce structured output for the PR comment system.

scenarioPool.title: Legal Document Analysis Platform
scenarioPool.description: A law firm is building a document analysis platform that processes contracts, extracts key clauses, flags risks, and generates summaries. Documents range from 5 to 200 pages. The system must maintain factual accuracy and provide provenance for all extracted information.

scenarioPool.title: Enterprise MCP Tool Ecosystem
scenarioPool.description: A SaaS company is designing an MCP server ecosystem for their internal developer platform. They need to expose database queries, deployment tools, monitoring dashboards, and documentation search across multiple teams with different access levels.

scenarioPool.title: Medical Research Data Extraction
scenarioPool.description: A pharmaceutical company uses Claude to extract structured data from clinical trial reports. The system must handle ambiguous fields, validate extracted data against known schemas, and flag entries that require human review. Accuracy and reliability are paramount.

scenarioPool.title: Developer Onboarding Agent
scenarioPool.description: A large tech company deploys a Claude Code-based onboarding agent that helps new developers understand the codebase, set up their environment, and complete initial tasks. The agent uses CLAUDE.md files at multiple directory levels, custom commands for common workflows, and subagent delegation for complex setup procedures.
